admin_confirm_grant_admin_desc: This account will have full access to the back office and cross-tenant data.
admin_confirm_plan_desc: The account will move to the {plan} plan. This takes effect immediately.
admin_confirm_reactivate_desc: The account will be marked as active again.
admin_confirm_revoke_admin_desc: This account will lose access to the back office.
admin_confirm_suspend_desc: The account will be marked as suspended.
admin_drill_ai_hint: Total since the 1st of the current month.
admin_drill_ai_insight_body: AI usage reflects adoption of the Pro+ AI and Copilot plans. A sustained increase is an expansion signal to watch closely when calibrating credit packs.
admin_drill_feedback_hint: Feedback with a New or In progress status. Per-item detail is in the Feedback tab.
admin_feedback_empty_desc: Feedback submitted by users will appear here.
admin_feedback_sheet_desc: Detailed view of the selected feedback.
admin_forbidden_desc: This area is reserved for administrators. Redirecting.
admin_metric_sheet_desc: Detailed view of the selected metric.
admin_payments_empty_desc: Transactions collected through Paystack will appear here.
admin_subtitle: Overview of accounts, activity and user feedback.
affiliation_desc: Invite your team and your network. Every referral who subscribes through your link earns you a free month, and one for them too. The only CRM that rewards you for sharing it.
affiliation_point_1: One unique referral link to share
affiliation_point_2: A free month for every subscribed referral
affiliation_point_3: You and your referral both win
affiliation_title: You live off referrals. Make it pay on Filon too.
app_account_description: Manage your session on this device.
app_account_signout_confirm_desc: Your session on this device will be closed. You can sign back in at any time.
app_account_signout_hint: You will return to the home page. Your data stays safe.
app_appearance_description: Choose the theme for your workspace. The setting is remembered on this device.
app_byok_active_desc: OpenRouter key ••••{last4} active. The copilot uses your account, leaving your Filon credits untouched.
app_byok_active_hint: You can remove it anytime to switch back to your Filon credits.
app_byok_description: Plug in your own OpenRouter key: the copilot uses your account and doesn't spend your Filon credits.
app_byok_error: Key rejected. Check the key and try again.
app_byok_help: Create a key at openrouter.ai/keys (format sk-or-...).
app_byok_locked_desc: Personal keys are reserved for Copilot plans. Upgrade to Copilot to plug in your own OpenRouter key.
app_byok_removed: Key removed. The copilot uses your Filon credits again.
app_byok_saved: Key ••••{last4} activated. The copilot no longer uses your Filon credits.
app_changes_save_error: Your changes could not be saved.
app_changes_save_error_retry: Your changes could not be saved. Please try again.
app_checkout_error: Starting the payment failed. Please try again.
app_compare_agentic: Agentic copilot (AI acts on the pipeline)
app_compare_fair_use_byok: Fair use without hard wall · BYOK
app_compare_subtitle: What each plan unlocks, at a glance.
app_connections_description: Link your Google and GitHub accounts to sign in with one click.
app_connections_load_error: Unable to load your linked accounts.
app_current_plan_free_hint: · upgrade to Pro to lift the limits.
app_dialog_cancel_desc_after: , then your account reverts to Discovery. No data is deleted.
app_dialog_cancel_desc_before: Your Pro access stays active until the end date
app_dialog_cancel_success: Renewal cancelled. Access kept until the end date.
app_dialog_downgrade_desc_before: You keep Pro+ AI until the end date
app_dialog_downgrade_success: Switch to Pro scheduled for the end date.
app_dialog_downgrade_title: Switch to Pro at the end date?
app_lens_preview_hint: The labels below will apply across the whole pipeline.
app_mon_espace_description: Tailor the pipeline vocabulary to your activity. The stages stay the same, only the displayed labels change.
app_onboarding_description: We tailor your tags and labels to your profession. You can change everything afterwards.
app_onboarding_save_error: Your setup could not be saved.
app_onboarding_skip_error: This step could not be skipped.
app_onboarding_title: What is your line of work?
app_onboarding_welcome: Welcome to Filon, your workspace is ready.
app_parametres_subtitle: Manage your profile, your pipeline preferences and your account.
app_payment_card_desc: Automatic renewal handled by Paystack. Cancel anytime from your settings.
app_payment_methods_hint: Pay by card or mobile money (Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo). Card enables automatic renewal handled by Paystack; mobile money covers the chosen period, with a renewal reminder at the end date.
app_payment_mobile_desc: Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo. One-off payment covering the period, with a reminder before the end date.
app_photo_description: It appears on your avatar throughout the app.
app_photo_hint_custom: You're using an uploaded photo. PNG, JPG or WebP, 5 MB maximum.
app_photo_hint_synced: If you've linked Google or GitHub, your photo syncs automatically at each sign-in. Upload one to replace it.
app_photo_invalid_type: Choose an image file (PNG, JPG, WebP).
app_photo_too_large: Image too large. Maximum size: 5 MB.
app_plan_copilot_feat_2: Agentic copilot: it analyzes and acts (create, follow up, draft)
app_plan_copilot_feat_3: Agent action log, traceable and reversible
app_plan_copilot_feat_4: Generous AI quota under fair use, no hard wall
app_plan_copilot_max_feat_2: XXL AI quota under fair use (20,000 credits/month)
app_plan_copilot_tagline: The AI agent that acts on your pipeline.
app_plan_free_tagline: To start your outreach, free of charge.
app_plan_pro_ai_feat_4: 300 AI credits per month, then top up
app_plan_pro_ai_tagline: Everything in Pro, plus pay-per-use AI assistance.
app_plan_pro_tagline: To prospect without limits and automate monitoring.
app_plan_team_tagline: For agencies and teams sharing a pipeline.
app_preferences_description: The currency is used to display your pipeline amounts. You can also rename the stages to match how you work.
app_profile_description: This information personalizes your workspace. Your name appears in your account menu.
app_profile_email_hint: Your email address is tied to your login and cannot be changed here.
app_profile_headline_hint: A one-line description of you. Optional.
app_stage_labels_hint: Customize the name of each pipeline column. Left as is, Filon uses the default labels.
app_sub_action_error: Action unavailable right now. Please try again.
app_sub_dunning: Your last card charge failed. Paystack will retry. Check your payment method so you don't lose access.
app_sub_free_hint: You're on the free plan. Upgrade to Pro to lift the limits.
app_tarifs_payment_confirmed: Payment confirmed. Your plan is active.
app_tarifs_payment_unconfirmed: Payment not confirmed. If you were charged, the plan will be activated shortly.
app_tarifs_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your outreach. No commitment, change whenever you like.
app_tool_no_followups: No upcoming follow-ups. You're all caught up.
app_tool_nothing_to_followup: Nothing to follow up: all your active opportunities have a next action.
app_tool_pipeline_empty: Pipeline empty for now. Ask the copilot to create an opportunity.
app_unlink_blocked_hint: Set a password or link another account before unlinking this one.
app_unlink_confirm_desc: You won't be able to sign in with this provider anymore. You can relink it at any time.
app_upgrade_generic_desc: Unlock automation and AI to prospect without limits.
app_usage_near_cap: Almost at the Discovery plan cap.
app_usage_upgrade_cta: Upgrade to Pro for an unlimited pipeline.
auth_aside_body: Applications, spontaneous pitches, freelance outreach and ongoing missions: everything lives in a single pipeline, with the right follow-ups at the right time.
auth_aside_title: Never let a single opportunity slip away.
auth_reassurance: No credit card · Your data stays private
carnet_changes_save_failed: Your changes could not be saved.
carnet_choose_file_attach_aria: Choose a file to upload and attach
carnet_company_create_failed: The company could not be created.
carnet_company_dialog_desc_create: Save a company you are targeting or already talking to.
carnet_contact_dialog_desc_create: Save a person, linked to a company or tracked directly (prospect, referral).
carnet_delete_company_desc: "{name}" will be deleted. Its linked contacts and opportunities will not be removed but will be detached from this company.
carnet_delete_contact_desc: "{name}" will be deleted. Linked opportunities will be detached from this contact.
carnet_delete_document_desc: "{name}" will be permanently deleted, including the file. This action cannot be undone.
carnet_document_dialog_desc: Rename the document or change its type. The file stays unchanged.
carnet_documents_empty_desc: Keep the right resume and cover letter ready for every opportunity. Upload your files from the area above to start your library.
carnet_documents_page_subtitle: Your library of resumes, letters, portfolios and contracts, with their links to your opportunities, proposals and contacts.
carnet_drop_file_to_add: Drop a file in the area above to add it.
carnet_empty_desc: Add the companies you are targeting and the individuals you follow (prospects, relationships, referrals) to keep everything connected in one place.
carnet_explorer_title: View documents linked to an entity
carnet_hint_company: Select a company above to view, attach or detach its documents.
carnet_hint_contact: Select a contact above to view, attach or detach its documents.
carnet_hint_no_company: You don't have any companies yet. Create one to attach your documents to it.
carnet_hint_no_contact: You don't have any contacts yet. Create one to attach your documents to it.
carnet_hint_no_opportunity: You don't have any opportunities yet. Create one to attach your documents to it.
carnet_hint_no_proposal: You don't have any proposals yet. Create one to attach your documents to it.
carnet_hint_opportunity: Select an opportunity above to view, attach or detach its documents.
carnet_hint_proposal: Select a proposal above to view, attach or detach its documents.
carnet_no_filleul: No network members yet. Mark a contact as Active in their profile to add them to your network.
carnet_no_linked_document: No linked document. Attach a resume, a letter or a contract to keep the right file at hand.
carnet_notes_placeholder: Details, context, points to follow up
carnet_page_subtitle: Your targeted companies and the individuals you follow, linked to your opportunities and documents.
carnet_referred_by_placeholder: Who introduced you to this person
carnet_search_placeholder: Search a company, a person, a city...
carnet_upload_hint: Resumes, letters, portfolios, contracts. 20 MB maximum per file.
command_description: Search for a page, an action or a record. Arrows to navigate, Enter to confirm, Esc to close.
command_input_placeholder: Search a page, an action, a record…
copilot_credits_empty_desc: You've used all your AI credits. Top up with a pack or move to a higher tier.
copilot_empty_desc: Ask about your pipeline or let the copilot act for you.
copilot_fair_use_desc: You're continuing on fair use. Top up a pack to support Filon.
copilot_mode_locked_aria: Quality is reserved for Copilot plans, see pricing
copilot_no_actions: The copilot hasn't done anything on your pipeline yet. Ask it to act and it will show up here.
copilot_perm_auto_desc: The copilot acts on its own
copilot_perm_locked_desc: Available on the Copilot Max plan
copilot_seed_company: Help me move forward with {company}: which opportunities and next actions?
copilot_seed_opportunity: Help me with the opportunity "{title}" at {company}: what is the next action?
copilot_seed_opportunity_no_company: Help me with the opportunity "{title}": what is the next action?
copilot_seed_week: What are my priorities this week?
copilot_subtitle: Your prospecting assistant. Ask, it acts.
copilot_suggest_create: Create a Designer opportunity at Orange
copilot_suggest_priorities: What are my priorities this week?
copilot_upsell_desc: The agentic copilot is part of the Copilot tier. Ask questions, create opportunities, schedule follow-ups in plain language.
copilot_upsell_packs: Credit packs are also available to go further.
creator_bio: Based in Abidjan, passionate about tech solutions for French-speaking Africa. Filon was born from that need: precise, fast tools that do one thing and do it well.
creator_role: Head of Development @ African Digit Consulting · Full-Stack Developer
cta_subtitle: A few minutes to centralize everything. No reason to let the next contract slip away.
cta_title: Take back control of your opportunities.
dash_activity_empty_desc: Your notes, emails and stage changes will appear here as soon as you interact with an opportunity.
dash_followup_remove_confirm_desc: "{label}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
dash_newfollowup_desc: Note what to do and when. Filon will remind you at the right time.
dash_newfollowup_error_failed: The follow-up could not be scheduled. Try again.
dash_newfollowup_label_placeholder: E.g. Follow up after the interview
dash_newfollowup_toast_error: The follow-up could not be scheduled.
dash_onboarding_body_before: From your first lead, your funnel, your daily follow-ups and your activity come alive here. Quick capture with the key
dash_relances_empty_desc: No follow-up scheduled. Plan your next one so nothing slips through.
dash_relances_subtitle: What to follow up on, sorted by due date. Never lose a lead for lack of follow-up.
dash_today_empty_desc: No overdue follow-ups, none due today. Plan the next one from an opportunity.
dashboard_error_body: An error occurred while loading your metrics. Please try again shortly.
dashboard_subtitle: Your priorities for the day and the shape of your pipeline.
feedback_description: A bug, an idea, a remark: tell us everything, we read every message.
feedback_error: Could not send. Please try again in a moment.
feedback_message_placeholder: Describe the bug, the idea or the remark.
feedback_success: Thanks, your feedback has been sent.
field_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
flag_banner_title: Priorities flagged by your head of sales
flag_dialog_description: {owner} will be notified and will see this opportunity at the top of their priorities.
footer_tagline: Filon · Never let an opportunity slip away again.
hero_reassurance: No credit card · Your data stays private
hero_subtitle: Freelancers, network marketers, agents, recruiters: your prospects, clients and referrals live in a single board. Filon always tells you who to follow up with, when, and where each lead stands.
hero_title: Never let a relationship slip again.
login_subtitle: Pick up your opportunities right where you left them.
member_invite_description: Send an email invitation and choose the role.
member_remove_confirm_desc: This person will lose access to the organization. Their personal pipeline stays intact.
members_empty: No members yet. Invite your team.
metrics_description: Performance per member. Export an Excel or PDF report.
notifications_empty_desc: Your follow-ups and subscription alerts will show up here.
opp_activity_add_error: The activity could not be added.
opp_activity_empty: No activity yet, add a note or schedule a follow-up.
opp_activity_placeholder: Add a note, log an exchange...
opp_add_dialog_desc: A new lead to track in your pipeline.
opp_ai_analyze_error: AI analysis failed. Try again in a moment.
opp_ai_credits_empty_draft: Credit balance exhausted to generate a draft.
opp_ai_draft_teaser_desc: Targeted letter or email, generated for this opportunity.
opp_ai_intro: Let AI assess this opportunity and tell you whether to apply or reach out.
opp_ai_locked_desc: A relevance score, the action to favor (apply or reach out) and a first message draft, generated for this opportunity.
opp_ai_score_desc: AI scores each opportunity against your profile.
opp_board_empty_message: Add your first lead to get started. Applications, pitches and missions all live in this board.
opp_calendar_empty_message: Add a deadline or schedule a follow-up on an opportunity to see it appear here.
opp_changes_save_error: The changes could not be saved.
opp_company_create_error: The company could not be created.
opp_contact_create_error: The contact could not be created.
opp_contact_hint: A person you track directly (prospect, referral). Fill in their details from the contacts book.
opp_delete_confirm_desc: This action is irreversible. The activity timeline will also be deleted. Follow-ups and documents will be detached.
opp_detail_sheet_description: Details, stage, activity and follow-ups for the selected opportunity.
opp_documents_empty: No document attached to this opportunity.
opp_edit_desc_header: The stage is changed from the opportunity header.
opp_edit_desc_table: The stage is changed directly from the table.
opp_empty_message: Add your first lead to start tracking.
opp_followup_plan_error: The follow-up could not be scheduled.
opp_form_notes_placeholder: Details, context, points to follow up
opp_form_origin_hint: Where does this lead come from?
opp_form_source_detail_placeholder: e.g. SARA 2026 trade show, referred by Awa
opp_form_target_hint: Who are you tracking for this opportunity?
opp_not_found_message: This opportunity does not exist or does not belong to you.
opp_quick_add_desc: Give it a title and a type. You can fill in the details afterwards.
opp_target_company_hint: An employer or a potential client
opp_target_person_hint: A person you track directly (prospect, referral)
opp_workspace_subtitle: All your leads, applications, pitches and missions.
org_create_description: Bring your sales team together to share visibility and drive priorities.
org_delete_confirm_desc: All members will be removed. This action is irreversible.
org_delete_description: Deletes the organization and removes all members. Personal pipelines stay intact. This cannot be undone.
org_empty_description: Create an organization to invite your team, or wait for an invitation.
org_invites_description: You have been invited to join an organization.
org_page_subtitle: Your team, its members and priorities.
origin_badge: Proudly built in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire
origin_intro: Filon is built in Côte d'Ivoire, close to the realities of the field: independents, network marketers, agents. That grounding is our strength: a tool that speaks your language, understands your payment methods and your market, while staying open to the whole world.
origin_market_desc: We know the codes of prospecting and client relationships in the region: missions, referrals, mandates, proposals.
origin_pay_desc: Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo. Settle your subscription with the methods you already use, no friction, no conversion.
origin_support_desc: A team that answers during West African business hours, in clear language, with no lag to slow you down.
origin_title: Born in Abidjan, built for everyone who prospects, in French-speaking Africa and beyond.
personas_assurance_desc: Prospects, subscribers, renewals followed up at the right time.
personas_commercial_desc: Leads, accounts, opportunities, quotes: your pipeline and follow-ups, with team tracking for your manager.
personas_emploi_desc: Applications and follow-ups tracked, never a missed opportunity.
personas_freelance_desc: From first contact to signed deal: missions, proposals, clients, follow-ups.
personas_immo_desc: Buyers, sellers, mandates, viewings: no file slips through.
personas_recruteur_desc: Candidates, roles, talent pools, interviews: all sourcing in one pipeline.
personas_relationnel_desc: Track prospects through to sign-up, keep your network active, aim for your next rank. What your company app doesn't do.
personas_subtitle: The same pipeline, labels that adapt to what you do. Pick your activity, the app follows.
pillar_ai_desc: Relevance scoring on your opportunities, plus targeted drafts for cover letters, emails or resumes. You stay in control, the AI handles the first draft.
pillar_pipeline_desc: From lead to signed contract, drag each opportunity from one stage to the next. Applications, pitches, outreach and missions in the same board.
pillar_watch_desc: Set your criteria once. Filon monitors listings and surfaces the relevant opportunities, ready to enter your pipeline.
pillar_watch_point_2: New listings surfaced as a feed
pillars_title: Everything you need to never let anything slip away.
pricing_payment_note: Payment by card or mobile money (Wave, Orange Money, MTN MoMo). Card enables automatic renewal; mobile money covers the chosen period, with a re-subscription reminder at expiry.
pricing_subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade to a higher tier whenever you want, no commitment.
pricing_title: A tier for every stage of your outreach.
problem_after_1: Every lead at the right pipeline stage
problem_after_4: Potential revenue tracked in real time
problem_after_note: Everything in one place. Filon tells you what to do next.
problem_before_1: An email here, a LinkedIn message there
problem_before_2: An application lost in a browser tab
problem_before_4: No visibility on the revenue at stake
problem_before_note: Leads going cold, forgotten follow-ups, contracts won elsewhere.
problem_title: Your opportunities are scattered. The good ones end up slipping away.
proof_body: Filon was born from a concrete need: stop losing opportunities for lack of follow-up. No bloat, no sprawling CRM. A precise, fast instrument that does one thing and does it well.
proof_quote: "A vein is a seam of ore. The right lead, at the right time. Filon helps you stop missing it."
proof_title: Built by an independent, for everyone who lives off their relationships.
proof_value_data_desc: Private by default, exportable whenever you want. No reselling.
proof_value_fast_desc: Dense, clean interface, shortcuts, zero wasted loading. Built for speed.
proof_value_nobloat_desc: Exactly what you need to run your outreach. Nothing to unlearn.
prop_board_empty_message: Create your first unsolicited proposal to track it from draft to signature.
prop_convert_confirm_description: A deal opportunity will be created in your pipeline from this accepted proposal. The proposal stays unchanged.
prop_delete_confirm_description: “{title}” will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
prop_dialog_description: Compose your offer, then send it to one or more recipients (companies and individuals), each tracked individually.
prop_empty_message: Reach out to the right companies without letting anything slip. Create your first unsolicited proposal to track it through to signature.
prop_error_amount_number: The amount must be a number.
prop_field_pitch_placeholder: What you offer, the value you bring, the context...
prop_followup_toast_schedule_error: The follow-up could not be scheduled.
prop_followups_empty: No follow-up planned. Schedule one so this proposal doesn't go unanswered.
prop_no_company_attached: No company linked to this proposal.
prop_not_found_message: This proposal does not exist or is not yours.
prop_page_subtitle: Track your unsolicited proposals and prospecting, from draft to signature.
prop_recipient_hint_accepted: Accepted your offer. Convert it into a deal.
prop_recipient_hint_pending: Awaiting send. Address the offer to this recipient.
prop_recipient_hint_sent: Sent. Awaiting a reply, remember to follow up.
prop_recipients_help_composed: Add the companies and individuals you are sending this offer to.
prop_recipients_help_not_composed: Save the offer above first to add recipients.
prop_recipients_panel_empty: No recipients yet. Open “Edit” to send this offer to companies or individuals.
prop_sheet_description: Details, status, pitch, company and follow-ups for the selected proposal.
prop_status_hint_accepted: Accepted. Convert it into a deal in your pipeline.
prop_status_hint_draft: Draft in progress. Mark it sent as soon as it goes out.
prop_status_hint_refused: Declined. Keep the record, another door will open.
prop_status_hint_sent: Sent. Awaiting a reply, schedule a follow-up.
prop_toast_company_create_error: The company could not be created.
prop_toast_contact_create_error: The contact could not be created.
prop_toast_converted: Converted into a deal in the pipeline.
prop_toast_offer_save_error: The offer could not be saved.
prop_toast_recipient_add_error: The recipient could not be added.
prop_toast_recipient_remove_error: The recipient could not be removed.
prop_toast_status_change_error: The status could not be changed.
prop_toast_status_update_error: The status could not be updated.
quick_capture_description: Add an opportunity to your pipeline in seconds.
rank_goal_focus_empty: No advanced opportunities. Follow up with your prospects to prepare the next rank.
rank_goal_focus_hint: Your most advanced opportunities: focus on them.
rank_goal_hint: Your company app shows your rank. Filon tells you who to go get for the next one.
referral_how_1: Share your unique link with your team and network.
referral_how_2: Your referral signs up and moves to a paid plan.
referral_how_3: You get a free month, and so do they. Both sides win.
referral_list_empty: No referrals yet. Share your link to get started.
referral_page_subtitle: Share Filon, earn free months for every referral who subscribes.
referral_pending_hint: Applied as soon as you move to a paid plan.
referral_share_text: I manage my prospects and network with Filon. Try it via my link:
renewal_error: Renewal link unavailable. Please try again.
role_admin_desc: Manages the organization, members and exports.
role_head_sell_desc: Sees the whole team and flags priorities.
settings_language_description: Choose the language of your workspace. The setting is remembered on this device.
showcase_subtitle: Drag your leads across the board, scan them in a list, compare the numbers in a table, or schedule your follow-ups on the calendar.
showcase_title: The same pipeline, seen the way you work.
signup_error_exists: An account already exists with this email address.
signup_error_generic: Account creation failed. Please try again.
signup_subtitle: A few seconds to centralize all your opportunities.
signup_terms: By creating an account, you agree to our terms of use.
suggestions_empty_desc: No urgent action detected. Ask the copilot where to focus your effort.
suggestions_empty_pipeline_desc: No active opportunity. Kick off your prospecting today.
suggestions_empty_pipeline_seed: My pipeline is empty. Help me start prospecting this week.
suggestions_noaction_desc: Active leads have no next action scheduled. Give them a follow-through.
suggestions_noaction_seed: I have {count} active opportunity(ies) with no next action scheduled. Suggest a next step for each.
suggestions_overdue_desc: Some follow-ups are past due. Take back control before you lose the thread.
suggestions_overdue_seed: I have {count} overdue follow-up(s). Help me prioritize them and draft the messages.
suggestions_stale_desc: No activity for over {days} days. A nudge can revive them.
suggestions_stale_seed: I have {count} opportunity(ies) with no activity for {days}+ days. Which to follow up first and how?
suggestions_subtitle: Computed from your pipeline, no credits used.
team_description: All your team's opportunities. Flag priorities to guide your reps.
team_empty: No opportunities in the team yet.
teams_metrics_desc: The whole team's pipeline on one board, per-rep metrics (opportunities, won, conversion), XLSX and PDF export for your reporting.
teams_priority_desc: In one click, with a note, the manager flags the opportunity to handle first. The rep sees it at the top of their pipeline and gets a notification, without their own priorities being overwritten.
teams_roles_desc: Admin, head sell, commercial, SDR. Invite by email, everyone joins with the right access. Free up to 3 members, unlimited beyond.
teams_subtitle: Bring your reps into one organization. Everyone keeps their own pipeline; the manager gains visibility and steers the effort. No double entry, no duplicating your in-house tool.
teams_title: And when you're a team, Filon runs the team.
veille_auto_body: Filon monitors your sources every 6 hours and captures offers matching your keywords, even while you sleep. On Discovery, run the watch manually with "Run now".
veille_captures_desc: The journey of your captured offers: from detection to signing.
veille_captures_empty_body: Run a watch to start capturing offers and leads.
veille_captures_empty_title: Your watches haven't captured anything yet
veille_delete_dialog_desc: Filon will stop monitoring these keywords. Offers already imported are kept.
veille_form_desc: Define what Filon should monitor and what you plan to do with it: apply, prospect, or both.
veille_form_include_hint: At least one. Enter or comma to add.
veille_form_keyword_required: Add at least one keyword to include.
veille_form_notify_label: Notify me when new offers are captured
veille_form_sources_hint: Nothing checked: all sources are monitored.
veille_health_desc: Status of the sources Filon analyzes automatically on each run.
veille_health_note: Other sources (LinkedIn, Indeed, aggregators) can't be monitored automatically: use "Import an offer" to paste a link or some text.
veille_import_desc: Paste an offer link or its text. Filon analyzes the page and creates a lead in your pipeline.
veille_import_text_placeholder: Paste the content of a LinkedIn or other offer here...
veille_import_toast_parse_failed: Analyzing the offer failed. Try again or paste the text.
veille_import_toast_title_required: A title is required to create the opportunity.
veille_preview_partial_body: Some fields couldn't be read automatically. Complete the information before creating the opportunity.
veille_run_analyzing_desc: Filon scans your monitored sources in real time.
veille_run_empty_body: Everything that matches is already in your pipeline.
veille_run_error_body: An error occurred during the analysis. Try again in a moment.
veille_run_nosearch_body: Create a watch with a few keywords to start capturing.
veille_run_result_desc: Result of the last manual run.
veille_run_throttled_body: To spare the sources, try again in {n}s.
veille_searches_empty_body: Create a watch with a few keywords: Filon monitors the sources and captures offers and leads that match you.
veille_searches_subtitle: The searches Filon monitors to feed your pipeline.
veille_subtitle: Your prospecting radar: monitor multiple sources, capture offers and leads automatically.
veille_toast_created: Watch created. Filon is monitoring it for you.
veille_toast_run_failed: Starting the watch failed. Try again.
veille_toast_throttled: Watch already running, try again in {n}s.
